projects.title: Hopfield Associative Memory — Odd Digit Recall on 7-Segment
projects.author: Shanmukha Mangadahalli Siddaramu
projects.description: A 7-node Hopfield associative memory storing two 7-segment display patterns: digit 1 and digit 9. Given a noisy or partial segment pattern on the inputs, the network iterates each clock cycle until it recalls the nearest stored digit. Weights computed analytically via Hebbian learning (W = p1⊗p1 + p9⊗p9). Total gate count ~140 GE. Decimal point lights up when the network converges.

pinout.uo[7]: dp: decimal point — high when network has converged
pinout.uio[0]: start: pulse high 1 cycle to load input and begin recall

projects.title: simple XOR cipher
projects.author: Jan
projects.description: A simple xor cypher. Input the key using reset. encrypt using clock.

pinout.ui[0]: Input bit 1 for key and msg
pinout.ui[1]: Input bit 2 for key and msg
pinout.ui[2]: Input bit 3 for key and msg
pinout.ui[3]: Input bit 4 for key and msg
pinout.ui[4]: Input bit 5 for key and msg
pinout.ui[5]: Input bit 6 for key and msg
pinout.ui[6]: Input bit 7 for key and msg
pinout.ui[7]: Input bit 8 for key and msg
pinout.uo[6]: Output bit 1 msg, key head not zeros
pinout.uo[7]: Output bit 1 msg, key head not ones

projects.title: 2 Digit Display
projects.author: Mathias Sørensen
projects.description: Uses input 1 and 2 to display a 2-digit number on a 7-segment display

pinout.ui[0]: Connects to an and gate that checks if input 1 is not active and then switches on output pins for digit '1'. Also connects to a not gate for checking if input 1 is active and thus stops displaying a number.
pinout.ui[1]: Connects to an and gate that checks if input 0 is not active and then switches on output pins for digit '2'. Also connects to a not gate for checking if input 0 is active and thus stops displaying a number.
pinout.uo[0]: Toggled by input 0 to display segment A on the 7-segment display.
pinout.uo[1]: Toggled by input 0 and 1 to display segment B on the 7-segment display.
pinout.uo[2]: Toggled by input 0 and 1 to display segment C on the 7-segment display.
pinout.uo[3]: Toggled by input 0 to display segment D on the 7-segment display.
pinout.uo[4]: Toggled by input 0 to display segment E on the 7-segment display.
pinout.uo[6]: Toggled by input 0 to display segment G on the 7-segment display.
